name: checklists
description: Human-driven recurring checklists for routines, reports, and planning.

tools.name: list_checklists
tools.description: List all currently open checklist instances with their completion status.

tools.name: get_checklist
tools.description: Get the detailed state of a specific checklist instance, including all items.

instance_id.description: The UUID of the checklist instance.

tools.name: update_checklist_item
tools.description: Mark a checklist item as done or undone. Provide either the item's position (index) or a fuzzy label hint.

instance_id.description: The UUID of the checklist instance.

label_hint.description: A natural language fragment matching the item label (e.g., 'email').

status.description: The target status of the item.

tools.name: create_checklist_template
tools.description: Create a new recurring checklist template.

name.description: The name of the checklist (e.g., 'Monday Morning Routine').

description.description: Optional detailed description of the checklist's purpose.

items.description: List of items in the checklist template.

recurrence.description: Optional recurrence configuration for automatic instantiation.

rollover_policy.description: Policy for handling open items when a new instance is created.

nudge_config.description: Configuration to customize or disable deadline nudges.
